title: Blockchain Fork Scenarios
description: A flowchart illustrating the two primary types of blockchain forks (soft and hard forks), their causes, and the resulting chain state.
relationships: An upgrade can be backward-compatible leading to a Soft Fork where all nodes follow the new chain
An upgrade can be non-backward-compatible leading to a Hard Fork where the chain splits permanently
A temporary fork occurs from simultaneous block discovery but is resolved when the next block is mined
